title: Amazon 1hr delivery 🚚, GPT-5.4 mini 🤖, how Anthropic uses Skills 👨‍💻
rawText:
Amazon is rolling out one-hour and three-hour deliveries in parts of
the US. Three-hour delivery will be available in about 2,000 cities
and
towns ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

		TLDR 

		TOGETHER WITH [Wispr] [4]

TLDR 2026-03-18

 YOU TALK 4X FASTER THAN YOU TYPE. WHY ARE YOU STILL TYPING
EVERYTHING? (SPONSOR) [4] 

 Wispr Flow [5] turns your voice into clean, sendable text. Not clunky

 	* WORKS IN EVERY APP. Slack, Gmail, Notion, ChatGPT, your browser,
your IDE. Zero setup.
 	* 89% SENT WITH ZERO EDITS. Flow removes filler words and formats as
you speak. No cleanup needed.
 	* EVERY PLATFORM. Mac, Windows, iPhone, and Android. One tap, done.

> "This is the best AI product I've used since ChatGPT." -- Rahul
> Vohra, CEO, Superhuman

TRY WISPR FLOW FREE [5] | START FREE [5]

📱 

BIG TECH & STARTUPS

 AMAZON ROLLS OUT 1-HOUR, 3-HOUR DELIVERY AS ULTRAFAST SHIPPING TREND
GROWS IN THE US (3 MINUTE READ) [6] 

 Amazon is rolling out one-hour and three-hour deliveries in parts of
the US. Three-hour delivery will be available in about 2,000 cities
and towns, while one-hour delivery will be available in hundreds of
areas. More than 90,000 products are eligible for the service.
Shoppers will be able to filter search for products that can be
delivered in three hours or less. 

 OPENAI LAUNCHES GPT-5.4 MINI AND GPT-5.4 NANO ON APIS (2 MINUTE READ)
[7] 

 OpenAI has released GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano. GPT-5.4 mini is
live on the API, Codex, and ChatGPT, while the nano model is reserved
for API users only. Both models are designed for workflows where
response time shapes the product. GPT-5.4 mini is priced at $0.75 per
million input tokens and $4.50 per million output tokens, while
GPT-5.4 nano lands at $0.20 and $1.25. 

🚀 

SCIENCE & FUTURISTIC TECHNOLOGY

 NVIDIA PUSHES FURTHER INTO THE AUTONOMOUS VEHICLE SPACE TO COMPETE
WITH TESLA AND WAYMO (2 MINUTE READ) [8] 

 Nvidia is expanding its partnerships with both Uber and Lyft as it
positions itself as the technical backbone for future robotaxi fleets.
It is building out a full hardware and software platform for
self-driving vehicles. Its technology will help companies compete with
Tesla and Waymo. Shares of Uber and Lyft both rose on the news. 

 WATCH DONUT LAB'S MYSTERIOUS SOLID-STATE BATTERY CHARGE IN AN ACTUAL
EV (4 MINUTE READ) [9] 

 Donut Lab will supply its production solid-state battery pack to
Estonian company Verge Motorcycles this spring. The companies recently
showcased a Verge TS Pro motorcycle charging at a public DC
fast-charging station. The motorcycle was equipped with an 18 kWh
(nominal) solid-state battery pack with a manufacturer-estimated range
of 217 miles. The battery charged to 80% in 12 minutes. 

💻 

PROGRAMMING, DESIGN & DATA SCIENCE

 UNBLOCKED: CONTEXT THAT SAVES YOU TIME AND TOKENS (SPONSOR) [10] 

 Stop babysitting your coding agents. Unblocked [10] gives them the
organizational knowledge to generate mergeable code. It pulls context
from your engineering stack, resolves conflicts, and cuts the rework
cycle by delivering only what agents need for the task at hand. See
how Unblocked works. [10] 

 OPEN SWE: AN OPEN-SOURCE FRAMEWORK FOR INTERNAL CODING AGENTS (7
MINUTE READ) [11] 

 Open SWE is an open source framework that provides the core
architectural components for coding agents. It provides isolated cloud
sandboxes, curated toolsets, subagent orchestration, and integration
with developer workflows. The framework is intended as a customizable
foundation rather than a finished product. Every major component is
pluggable. 

 LESSONS FROM BUILDING CLAUDE CODE: HOW WE USE SKILLS (16 MINUTE READ)
[12] 

 Skills have become one of the most used extension points in Claude
Code due to their flexibility, ease of creation, and how simple they
are to distribute. This flexibility can make it hard to know what
works best. Anthropic has been using skills in Claude Code
extensively, with hundreds of them in active use. This post details
lessons Anthropic's team learned when using skills to accelerate
development. 

🎁 

MISCELLANEOUS

 AN INTERVIEW WITH NVIDIA CEO JENSEN HUANG ABOUT ACCELERATED COMPUTING
(40 MINUTE READ) [13] 

 This article contains an edited transcript of an interview with
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang. The interview covers Huang's GTC 2026
keynote, changes in AI over the past year, Nvidia's approach to
business, the AI stack and how it affects Nvidia, the China question,
and Huang's frustration with doomers and their influence in
Washington. 

 OPENAI HAS NEW FOCUS (ON THE IPO) (9 MINUTE READ) [14] 

 OpenAI's recent announcement that its leadership wants the company to
focus is likely related to its upcoming IPO. Ant
